<!--
Thanks for sending a patch. Keep this short; delete sections that do not apply.
See CONTRIBUTING.md for what lands easily and what needs an issue first.
-->

## What and why

<!-- One or two sentences on the user-visible change and the problem it solves. -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New tool / detection / log type
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor with no tool-surface change
- [ ] Surface change (new or renamed tool, resource, prompt, or env var) — opened an issue first per CONTRIBUTING.md

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Added or updated tests covering the change
- [ ] Updated the `## [Unreleased]` section of `CHANGELOG.md` for any user-visible effect
- [ ] If tools changed, the tool count and tables in `README.md` are still accurate
- [ ] No personal details, hostnames, real private IPs, account names, tokens, or unredacted absolute paths in code, tests, sample data, or this PR (use RFC 5737 `192.0.2.0/24` and generic hostnames in examples)
- [ ] Conventional commit messages, no AI co-authorship trailers
